components.title: compliant-s3
components.description: Reusable Terraform pattern for an AWS S3 primary bucket plus a dedicated access-log bucket. Hardcodes server-side encryption, versioning, public access block, access logging, and required compliance tags.
components.purpose: Provide a compliant-by-default S3 primitive that any team can adopt with three lines of consumer Terraform.

control-implementations.description: Implementation of NIST 800-53 Rev 5 controls satisfied by this module.

implemented-requirements.description: AES-256 server-side encryption is enforced via aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration. Hardcoded; consumers cannot override.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle containing terraform plan.json, conftest results, and tfsec scan. Chain of custody verified via scripts/verify-evidence.sh (Lab 4.4).

implemented-requirements.description: Public access is explicitly blocked via aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block, denying all four public access vectors (ACLs, bucket policy, ignore public ACLs, restrict public buckets). Hardcoded; consumers cannot override.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle containing terraform plan.json, conftest results, and tfsec scan. Chain of custody verified via scripts/verify-evidence.sh (Lab 4.4).

implemented-requirements.description: Access logging is enabled via aws_s3_bucket_logging, delivering server access logs to a dedicated, equally-protected log bucket with its own encryption and public access block.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle containing terraform plan.json, conftest results, and tfsec scan. Chain of custody verified via scripts/verify-evidence.sh (Lab 4.4).

implemented-requirements.description: Versioning is enabled via aws_s3_bucket_versioning, preserving prior object states for recovery and audit. Required compliance tags (Project, Environment, ManagedBy, ComplianceScope) are applied to every taggable resource by default via the provider's default_tags block, removing the chance of a missed tag.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle containing terraform plan.json, conftest results, and tfsec scan. Chain of custody verified via scripts/verify-evidence.sh (Lab 4.4).
